How To Play

Controls (P1)

  • WASD: Move / Jump / Crouch
  • J: Light Attack
  • K: Heavy Attack
  • L: Special Attack
  • I: Shield / Dodge

Mechanics

Lower your opponent's health to 0 to take their stock. First to lose all 3 stocks loses the match.

In ONLINE mode, lock in your Wager using SOL. Winning takes the pot!
